calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff Capital One.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Fawzia I. Indrawes.
Declaration of Lara Letellier pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA) N.A. and against Defendant Fawzia I. Indrawes as follows:
Principal in the amount of $6761.41
Costs in the amount of $284.50
Total amount of $7,0045.91
Counsel for Plaintiff to prepare Judgment to reflect the waiver of Prejudgment interest in the amount of $3,662.82.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-15-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Set For Trial On Oct-15-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Mar-28-2012 Text Ruling
